data.title: Investigation by Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC into officers and directors of Beauty Health Company (SKIN). Charles Foti leading.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, in New York and New Orleans, Charles C. Foti, Jr., a former Attorney General of Louisiana and current partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC ("KSF"), revealed that KSF has initiated a probe into The Beauty Health Company. This investigation seeks to examine potential inconsistencies or misconduct relating to Beauty Health.

data.title: More than 800 court service deputies in Cook County, Illinois, join Teamsters Local 700 for representation.
data.description: In Lombard, Illinois, on January 20, 2026, it was reported that over 800 court service deputies from Cook County have officially decided to affiliate with Teamsters Local 700 for enhanced representation. This group of deputies covers all areas within Cook County and comprises individuals who are actively employed in this role.

data.title: BCP S.A. to call EUR 500M Senior Preferred Notes due 2027, with an outstanding amount of 500M euros.
data.description: BCP S.A. has announced its plans to redeem the existing EUR 500,000,000 Senior Preferred Fixed to Floating Rate Notes due in 2027. The outstanding amount of these notes is 500 million euros.

data.title: NRP Group & Rockefeller Group start leasing of 342-unit luxury community, Miraluna, in Las Vegas; move-ins from March 2026.
data.description: In Las Vegas, pre-leasing has commenced for the new Miraluna Class A apartment community, a joint project by The NRP Group and Rockefeller Group. The development, which consists of 342 units and is situated near the Southern Highlands Master-Planned Community, is currently accepting applications. Initial residents are scheduled to move in starting March 2026. Miraluna, previously referred to as [previous name].

data.title: XRP president anticipates 4 crypto trends shaping finance by 2026: stablecoins, tokenized assets, custody consolidation, AI-blockchain. $1T in institutional digital asset holdings expected.
data.description: Monica Long anticipates that the combined forces of stablecoins, tokenized assets, custody consolidation, and the merging of AI and blockchain technologies will propel institutional digital asset holdings to reach $1 trillion by the conclusion of the year.

data.title: Chemical Insights scientist Katie Paul Friedman receives 2026 Achievement Award from Society of Toxicology for contributions in computational toxicology & NAMs.
data.description: In Atlanta, Dr. Katie Paul Friedman, a scientist at UL Research Institutes’ Chemical Insights, was honored with the 2026 Achievement Award by the Society of Toxicology. The award acknowledges her pioneering work in computational toxicology and advancements in new approach methodologies (NAMs) that are revolutionizing chemical safety evaluation. Dr. Paul Friedman, also the Director of the Center for Informatics and Screening at Chemical Insights, was commended for her outstanding contributions to the field.

data.title: SurGenTec® gains FDA approval for ION-C™ Facet Fixation System to aid in fusion, supporting alignment in spine surgeries.
data.description: A medical device innovation company in Boca Raton, Florida, SurGenTec®, has recently revealed that its ION-C™ Facet Fixation System has gained FDA clearance. This system, belonging to SurGenTec®’s posterior cervical platform, has been granted expanded indications enabling the treatment of cervical pseudoarthrosis when implanted bilaterally within the facet joints. The clearance is based on strong long-term clinical evidence, showcasing its efficacy. This development marks a significant milestone for the company in advancing treatment options for orthopedic and spine surgery.

data.title: Veteran grower Chris Weaver sets non-irrigated soybean yield record of 154.98 bu./acre in partnership with Locus Agriculture, Concept AgriTek, and AgroTech USA.
data.description: A successful collaboration between farmer Chris Weaver of Hickory Hollow Farms and input partners has resulted in an impressive yield of 154.98 bushels per acre. This achievement in Finksburg, Maryland, showcases the potential for remarkable outcomes when farmers and their trusted partners come together to employ a combined biological and foliar program. This significant yield serves as a testament to the power of collaboration in the agriculture industry and highlights the positive results that can be achieved through combined efforts.

data.title: Exiger executives to speak at USA House at WEF 2026 in Davos alongside U.S delegation, with 250 CEOs attending.
data.description: A prominent supply chain AI company, Exiger, has recently become a part of the influential Freedom 250 Events in Washington. This event also includes the participation of a U.S. delegation, CEOs from the private sector, and prominent figures with honor. Exiger is known for being the largest supplier of supply chain technology to the U.S. Government. This collaboration signifies a significant move in the supply chain industry and has garnered attention with its participation in such a prestigious event.

data.title: Agilon Health under investigation by Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC for officers and directors' actions. Jan. 20, 2026. #AGL
data.description: On January 20, 2026, Charles C. Foti, Jr., a former Attorney General of Louisiana and current partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, revealed that their firm is expanding its probe into agilon health, inc. This company is at the center of the investigation, and more information is being sought out.

data.title: Zilliz releases Milvus 2.6.x on Zilliz Cloud, enabling billion-scale vector search at reduced cost.
data.description: In Redwood City, California on January 20, 2026, Zilliz introduced the General Availability (GA) of Milvus 2.6.x on Zilliz Cloud. This update for the open-source vector database signifies significant architectural advancements. Zilliz, the developer of Milvus, is a prominent company in this field.

data.title: Hundreds of players will compete for a $250,000 prize pool at the APC National Championship on Jan 27-Feb 1, 2026.
data.description: Numerous skilled participants from various regions will vie for a portion of a $250,000 prize fund during the APC National Championship taking place from January 27 to February 1, 2026 in Roswell, Georgia. The event is organized by the Ace Pickleball Club (APC), a swiftly growing national pickleball organization.

data.title: Global traction equipment market size reached USD 6,234.4M in 2018, rose to USD 9,222.1M in 2024, and expected to hit USD 14,827.1M by 2032.
data.description: As of January 20, 2026, the global traction equipment market is experiencing consistent growth within rail and electric transportation sectors. In 2018, the market had a value of USD 6,234.4 million, which surged to USD 9,222.1 million by 2024. Forecasts suggest a continued upward trend in the market's expansion.
